svg.title: Synalux POS — inventory
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for inventory. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Stock levels | Depletion tracking | Low-stock alerts | 86'd auto-trigger -- pos_inventory table
3 items critically low -- auto-86'd on register and online menu
Salmon (0 portions) | Buffalo Wings (1 portion) | Lobster Bisque (2 portions)
Delivery from Star Beef -- 20 fresh patties
1. Auto-depletion: Each order line deducts from pos_inventory.quantity
2. Low-stock alert: Push notification to manager iPad + SMS when qty <= threshold
3. Auto-86: quantity = 0 --> item grayed on register, hidden on online menu
4. KDS note: Low-stock items show "LOW STOCK" badge on KDS ticket
5. Restock: Barcode scanner scan delivery label --> pre-fills item + batch qty
6. Reports: Daily depletion report, waste log, COGS estimation per category
DB: pos_inventory (current stock) + pos_inventory_events (full audit log)
No hardcodes -- all thresholds, units, reorder points, vendor links from DB per item
Synalux POS | Inventory | pos_inventory -- auto-depletion | low-stock alerts | auto-86 | vendor links -- no hardcodes
